brief: Morning! Two classes today — econ at 9 and statistics at 1. Your essay outline is due tomorrow, and you've got 40 pages of reading carried over from yesterday.
study: Focus mode is on: Notes and Calendar are open, Messages and Music are closed. Your essay outline is where you left it — section two needs the counter-argument.

summarize: That chapter covers price elasticity: how demand responds to price changes — the key formula is percentage change in quantity over percentage change in price, and the three worked examples all use the midpoint method.
timeline: Today you studied for 3 hours: essay outline done, 40 pages read, and two problem sets finished. Solid day.
